data: {"generalSituation":"An active southerly airstream and upper-air disturbances will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow. Tropical Cyclone Bavi over the western North Pacific will move towards the seas east of Taiwan in the next couple of days, and then edge closer to the coast of eastern China. Under the influence of its outer subsiding air, the weather will become fine over southern China in the latter part of this week. It will be extremely hot over inland areas on Friday and Saturday. Showers may also be triggered by high temperatures. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260707","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and squally thunderstorms.
